raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is in front of box_2, within the right arm workspace, and there is enough lateral clearance for the claw to close without contacting the boxes.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and lifted slightly above the tabletop."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "table (front-right clear area)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the chosen front-right region of the table is clear of other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is released on the front-right area of the table, out of the manipulation zone of the boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup has been cleared, and there is unobstructed space to the right of box_2 to allow a ~10 cm lateral shift without the box falling off the table.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is shifted ~10 cm to the right, creating a gap between box_1 and box_2 sufficient for a dual-arm grasp of box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "There is a clear frontal approach to box_1 and adequate space on both its left and right faces after moving box_2. Both end-effectors can contact the front face of box_1 simultaneously.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (the darker box) is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, completing the task of picking it up."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is in front of box_2, within the right arm workspace, and there is enough lateral clearance for the claw to close without contacting the boxes.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and lifted slightly above the tabletop.

parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the chosen front-right region of the table is clear of other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is released on the front-right area of the table, out of the manipulation zone of the boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup has been cleared, and there is unobstructed space to the right of box_2 to allow a ~10 cm lateral shift without the box falling off the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is shifted ~10 cm to the right, creating a gap between box_1 and box_2 sufficient for a dual-arm grasp of box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: There is a clear frontal approach to box_1 and adequate space on both its left and right faces after moving box_2. Both end-effectors can contact the front face of box_1 simultaneously.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (the darker box) is securely held by both end-effectors and lifted off the tabletop, completing the task of picking it up.
